description.value: This spell functions as tongues, except the creature touched gains only the ability to speak and understand a regional human language and the language granted must be one you know. You must select the language at the time of casting. The language can’t be a dead language. The target speaks the language with a native accent, but the spell doesn’t impart knowledge about any culture associated with the language, nor does it change the target’s appearance.
